Aunmoy Dey

AI Infrastructure Engineer | Senior Go Backend Engineer | Platform Engineer

Building AI Infrastructure, Distributed Systems, and Cloud-Native Platforms with Go, Kubernetes, and LLM Technologies

I design and build scalable backend systems, cloud-native platforms, and AI infrastructure using Go, Kubernetes, distributed systems, and modern LLM technologies.

My expertise spans event-driven architectures, multi-tenant SaaS platforms, Kubernetes platform engineering, AI gateways, RAG systems, observability, and production-grade cloud infrastructure. I specialize in building systems that are reliable, observable, secure, and capable of operating at scale.

Currently, I am building LogiFlow AI, a production-grade AI infrastructure platform that combines Kubernetes automation, multi-agent workflows, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Model Context Protocol (MCP), LLM routing, event-driven architecture, and enterprise-grade observability.

Backend Engineering

  • • Go (Golang)
  • • REST APIs & gRPC
  • • GraphQL & WebSocket
  • • Microservices Architecture
  • • Domain Driven Design (DDD)
  • • Clean Architecture
  • • Event Driven Architecture

  • • Performance Optimization
  • • Production Reliability

  • • Kafka & RabbitMQ
  • • Temporal Workflows

  • • Outbox & Saga Patterns
  • • Distributed Transactions
  • • High Availability Systems
  • • Fault Tolerance
  • • Load Balancing
  • • Circuit Breakers
  • • Resilience Patterns

Experience Highlights

Freelance Backend & Platform Engineer

International Client Projects

  • • Designed and developed scalable SaaS platforms
  • • Built and maintained Go microservices architectures
  • • Implemented RBAC, authentication, authorization, and multi-tenant systems
  • • Migrated monolithic systems toward modern service-oriented architectures
  • • Delivered production-ready backend systems using Go, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Kubernetes
  • • Collaborated directly with founders and business stakeholders

For Recruiters

I am a Go-focused Backend, Platform, and AI Infrastructure Engineer who specializes in building production-grade distributed systems. My work combines cloud-native engineering, Kubernetes automation, event-driven architectures, AI infrastructure, and observability to create scalable and reliable platforms.

Interested in roles involving: AI Infrastructure Engineering, AI Platform Engineering, Platform Engineering, Distributed Systems Engineering, Senior Backend Engineering, or Cloud Native Engineering.

I enjoy solving complex engineering challenges and building systems that operate reliably at scale.
